section_title: Hand-picked deals I'm watching at Safeway this week
section_subtitle: Curated by Scrolling the Aisle · week of Jul 8–Jul 14

deals.title: Frozen shrimp
deals.raw_offer: Waterfront Bistro Large Raw Shrimp, 31–40 ct, 1 lb bag, frozen: $5/lb
deals.subtitle: Friday-only: Frozen shrimp is about 30% cheaper than Costco.

deals.title: Bell peppers
deals.raw_offer: Red, orange, yellow or green bell peppers: 5 for $5
deals.subtitle: Friday-only: Bell peppers are about 30% cheaper than Costco.

deals.title: Nestlé Drumstick ice cream
deals.raw_offer: Nestlé Drumstick, 8–20 ct, selected varieties: $5 each
deals.subtitle: Friday-only: about 17% cheaper than Costco, plus a variety win.
deals.content_note: Do not label this as chicken drumsticks. Always say Nestlé Drumstick ice cream.

deals.title: Doritos / snack bags
deals.raw_offer: Doritos, Tostitos, Frito-Lay, Frito-Lay Simply Snacks: 2 for $5
deals.subtitle: Friday-only: close to Costco pricing, but Safeway wins on smaller bags and flavor variety.
deals.content_note: Do not claim huge Costco savings; this is mostly a smaller-bag / variety win.

deals.title: Hass avocados
deals.subtitle: 99¢ each, about 26% cheaper than Costco; for about Costco's 6-pack price, you can get roughly 8 at Safeway.

deals.title: Berries
deals.raw_offer: Strawberries 1 lb, Blueberries pint, Raspberries or Blackberries 6 oz: $2.99 each member price
deals.subtitle: Best on blackberries at about 30% cheaper than Costco; raspberries and blueberries also look 15–20% cheaper.
deals.content_note: Mention blackberries as the strongest comparison.

deals.title: Chobani yogurt
deals.raw_offer: Chobani Flip or Protein Yogurt: 99¢ each; Chobani/Oikos/Danone-style 4-pack: $3.49
deals.subtitle: Cheaper than Costco; with the 4-pack deal, Costco's 16-pack price gets you almost 22 at Safeway.
deals.content_note: There are two Chobani-related deals; preserve both prices if possible.

deals.title: Beef chuck short ribs
deals.raw_offer: USDA Choice Beef Chuck Short Ribs: $7.99/lb member price
deals.subtitle: Not an exact same-grade match, but Safeway looks cheaper across the comparable Costco short rib options.
deals.content_note: Use soft wording; grade/cut may not be exact.

deals.title: Pork shoulder ribs
deals.raw_offer: Signature Select Pork Shoulder Country Style Ribs or Blade Steak Pork Spareribs: $2.99/lb member price
deals.subtitle: About 21% cheaper than Costco, one of the stronger meat-counter comparisons.
deals.content_note: Use as pork shoulder/country-style ribs, not generic ribs.

deals.title: Sargento cheese
deals.raw_offer: Sargento String or Stick Cheese 9–12 oz or Shareables 6–8 oz: $4.99 member price
deals.subtitle: Down to nearly a third of regular retail pricing.
deals.content_note: This is a retail-price highlight more than a Costco comparison.

deals.title: Oreo / Nabisco snacks
deals.raw_offer: Nabisco Family Size Oreo Cookies 10.68–17.2 oz or Snack Crackers 6.5–13.7 oz: $3.49 each when you buy 2
deals.subtitle: Good time to buy Oreos; the smaller Safeway buy is close enough to Costco that variety matters.
deals.content_note: Do not mix this with Nabisco single-serve snack packs unless separately verified.

deals.title: Oreo variety angle
deals.raw_offer: Nabisco Family Size Oreo Cookies 10.68–17.2 oz or Snack Crackers 6.5–13.7 oz: $3.49 each when you buy 2
deals.subtitle: Costco may be a little cheaper on bulk, but with a gap under 10%, Safeway wins on smaller buy and variety.
deals.content_note: This can be merged with the Oreo/Nabisco card if the UI feels too crowded.
